intro: Our group is interested in designing and building bio-interactive robot systems with yet-to-be conceived functionalities. The backbone of our research is highly multidisciplinary at the intersection between Architected Materials, Soft Electronics, Soft Robotics, and Biomedical Engineering. The goal of our group spans a broad range of future robot applications from meter-scale marine energy harvesting, human-scale skin computer and actuation system down to microscale biomedical robots for cutting-edge cancer therapeutics.
